name: Fideicomiso Irrevocable F/2061 FHipo
summary: Fideicomiso Irrevocable F/2061 FHipo, a real estate investment trust, acquires, originates, co-participates, manages, and operates mortgage portfolios in Mexico. The company provides investors with exposure to the Mexican mortgage market and rewards them through a combination of dividend payments and capital gains. It has strategic alliance with Infonavit, Fovissste, and Smart Lending. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Mexico City, Mexico.
